search_queries_used: sickle cell disease children gene therapy (B-5)
RSV nirsevimab infants, HPV vaccine pediatric (C-1)

papers.title: Ustekinumab therapy for moderately to severely active pediatric Crohn's disease: UNITI Jr study safety and efficacy results in patients weighing at least 40 kg.
papers.abstract: UNITI Jr is a phase 3 study evaluating the efficacy, safety, and pharmacokinetics of ustekinumab, an interleukin-12/-23 antagonist, in pediatric patients with moderately to severely active Crohn's disease. Results from patients weighing at least 40 kg are reported. At Week 8, 52.1% achieved clinical remission and 93.8% achieved clinical response. Clinical remission at Week 52 was achieved in 60.0% (q12w) and 43.5% (q8w). Ustekinumab was safe and well-tolerated.
papers.summary_ja: 体重40kg以上の中等症〜重症小児クローン病患者48名のPhase 3 RCTで、ウステキヌマブ投与8週後の臨床寛解率52.1%・臨床応答率93.8%と52週にわたる良好な安全性が示された。小児IBD治療における生物学的製剤の選択肢拡大につながる重要なエビデンス。
papers.search_query: pediatric Crohn disease biologic vedolizumab ustekinumab

papers.title: Rituximab-induced hypogammaglobulinemia in childhood nephrotic syndrome: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
papers.abstract: Systematic review of 33 studies. The pooled incidence of hypogammaglobulinemia in children with nephrotic syndrome receiving rituximab was 11.4% (95% CI, 6.4-19.5). Risk ratio 1.81 (95% CI 1.46-2.25). In 517 episodes of hypogammaglobulinemia, 93 (18%) infections occurred, four of which were fatal.
papers.summary_ja: 小児ネフローゼ症候群へのリツキシマブ投与後の低ガンマグロブリン血症は11.4%に発症し、リツキシマブ非使用群との比較RRは1.81。発症517例中93例に感染症、4例死亡という重篤なリスクを定量化した系統的レビュー・メタ解析。
papers.domain_name: 小児ネフローゼ症候群

papers.title: Long-term efficacy and safety of Control-IQ technology in younger children with type 1 diabetes in Italy (2020-2023): a longitudinal multicentre real-world study.
papers.type: 多施設コホート研究（実臨床）
papers.abstract: Longitudinal observational study (32 Italian centers, 253 children <11 years with T1DM using Control-IQ, 18-month follow-up). TIR increased by 5.45% from baseline to 6 months and maintained through 18 months. No severe hypoglycemia in younger (0.5-5y) group. Supports potential supervised off-label use in young children.
papers.summary_ja: イタリア32施設の0.5〜10歳T1DM児253名にControl-IQ AIDを使用した18ヶ月実臨床データで、両年齢群ともにTIR約5.45%改善・重篤な低血糖ゼロ。幼少期での実臨床AID使用の安全性を支持するデータ。
papers.search_query: automated insulin delivery closed loop pediatric type 1 diabetes

papers.title: Society of Critical Care Medicine 2026 Guidelines on the Care and Management of Pediatric and Neonatal Intensive Care Patients at the End of Life.
papers.abstract: SCCM 2026 guidelines for EOL care in pediatric and neonatal ICU. 21-member multidisciplinary panel, GRADE methodology, systematic review 2000-2025. Five conditional recommendations: advance care planning, pediatric palliative care consultation, systematic symptom management, bereavement support, health equity in EOL care.
papers.summary_ja: SCCM（米国集中治療医学会）が2026年に発表した小児・新生児ICU終末期ケアガイドライン。GRADEアプローチで5つの条件付き推奨（事前ケア計画・緩和ケア連携・症状管理・遺族支援・ヘルスエクイティ）を提示した。
papers.domain_name: 小児緩和ケア・終末期
papers.search_query: pediatric palliative care advance care planning PICU

papers.title: Practical consensus recommendations for polytherapy involving stiripentol in Dravet syndrome: A nominal group approach.
papers.type: コンセンサス推奨（Nominal Group法）
papers.abstract: Consensus initiative for management of Dravet syndrome with stiripentol-containing regimens. 5 experts developed 38 statements, validated by 59 international clinicians. 34/38 (89%) reached consensus. Topics: general principles, family empowerment, STP add-on to specific/non-specific ASMs, FFA in STP regimens, CBD in STP regimens, patient follow-up.
papers.summary_ja: Dravet症候群のスチリペントール含む多剤療法管理に関する国際コンセンサス。専門家5名が38ステートメントを作成し59名の国際パネルが検証した結果、89%（34/38項目）でコンセンサスが成立。STP+CBD+FFA組み合わせの実践指針を提示。
papers.search_query: Dravet syndrome fenfluramine cannabidiol epilepsy children

papers.title: [Clinical Analysis of Blinatumomab in the Treatment of 21 Children with Relapsed/Refractory B-Cell Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia].
papers.journal: Zhongguo shi yan xue ye xue za zhi
papers.abstract: 21 children with R/R B-ALL. Blinatumomab: 8/8 patients with blasts ≥5% achieved CR (87.5%). MRD negativity 92.3%. 1-year OS 92.3±7.4%. Low tumor burden predicts better response.
papers.summary_ja: 再発/難治性小児B-ALL 21例のブリナツモマブ後ろ向き解析。低腫瘍負荷でMRD転陰率92.3%、1年OS率92.3%と良好な短期成績。有害事象は管理可能。
papers.search_query: pediatric ALL MRD-guided therapy CAR-T blinatumomab

papers.title: International Experience of Transcatheter Sinus Venosus Defect Closure in Children and Adolescents.
papers.abstract: 54 patients <18 years from 12 centres. Transcatheter SVD closure using covered stents. Procedural success 98.1%. One embolization needing surgery. Follow-up 1-174 months, 3 reinterventions for residual shunt. Smaller sheaths feasible in pediatric anatomy.
papers.summary_ja: 12施設54例の小児・青年における洞静脈欠損経カテーテル閉鎖術の国際多施設後ろ向き研究。手術成功率98.1%、長期経過でも安全で外科手術の代替として有望。

papers.title: Genomic newborn screening as a paradigm shift in rare disease management, with emphasis on endocrine conditions.
papers.abstract: Review of international gNBS pilot programs. Endocrine disorders represent ~10% of conditions. French PGC1 project identified 125 endocrine gene-disease dyads (62 treatable, 63 actionable). gNBS enables earlier diagnosis and precision care for rare endocrine diseases.
papers.summary_ja: ゲノム新生児スクリーニング（gNBS）の国際パイロット研究をレビュー。内分泌疾患が全体の約10%を占め、125の内分泌関連gene-disease対（治療可能62対）が同定された。希少内分泌疾患の早期診断・精密医療へのパラダイムシフトを論じた。
papers.domain_name: 新生児黄疸・代謝異常
papers.search_query: expanded newborn screening SMA lysosomal hypoglycemia

papers.title: Population Pharmacokinetics and Dosing Regimen Optimization of Ceftazidime in Plasma and Cerebrospinal Fluid of Neonatal Sepsis Patients.
papers.abstract: PPK model using plasma and CSF samples from 69 neonates. 50 mg/kg q8h (30-min infusion) achieves ≥90% PTAs for MIC ≤4 mg/L in neonates 2-5kg. CSF MIC=4 mg/L requires 4-hour extended infusion.
papers.summary_ja: 新生児69名のセフタジジム血漿・CSFのPPKモデルで、通常投与（50mg/kg q8h・30分点滴）は菌血症カバー可能だが、髄膜炎（MIC=4 mg/L）には4時間延長点滴が必要と示した。
papers.search_query: neonatal early-onset sepsis calculator empiric antibiotics

papers.title: Neonatal sepsis in Africa: what are we missing?
papers.abstract: Personal View assessing AMR neonatal sepsis crisis in Africa. Sociocultural, health system, and political determinants identified. Calls for community-centred One Health approach integrating biomedical, environmental, and sociocultural dimensions.
papers.summary_ja: アフリカの新生児敗血症は薬剤耐性菌・社会文化的障壁・断片化した医療体制が複合的に死亡率を高めており、政治的不作為が中心的問題。コミュニティ中心のOne Healthアプローチへの転換を訴えるLancet Microbeの論考。

papers.title: Patent Ductus Arteriosus Persistence and Neurodevelopmental Outcomes: A Restrictive Treatment Approach Does Not Compromise Neurological Development.
papers.abstract: Retrospective single-center study of 171 preterm infants ≤32 weeks. Restrictive PDA treatment approach: PDA duration did not significantly affect neurodevelopmental outcomes (Bayley-III at 22-26 months) after multivariate adjustment. Gestational age and comorbidities were the key determinants.
papers.summary_ja: ≤32週早産児171名の後ろ向き研究で、制限的PDA治療アプローチでは多変量解析でPDA持続期間は神経発達アウトカムに有意な影響なし。在胎週数・併存疾患が主要な神経発達規定因子。
papers.search_query: preterm infant patent ductus arteriosus neurodevelopment

papers.title: Oral Immunotherapy With or Without Probiotics vs Avoidance for Children With Food Allergy.
papers.abstract: Editorial discussing OIT with or without probiotics versus avoidance for food allergy in children, published in JAMA Network Open.
papers.summary_ja: 食物アレルギー小児における経口免疫療法（プロバイオティクス有無）vs回避戦略の臨床的意義を論じたJAMA Network Openのエディトリアル。OIT領域の最新議論を整理している。
papers.search_query: oral immunotherapy peanut children multi-food OIT

papers.title: Exploring Affordable Curative Therapy for Sickle Cell Disease in Africa: A Comprehensive Overview.
papers.abstract: Comprehensive overview of affordable curative therapy (gene therapy, HSCT) for SCD in Africa. Addresses cost barriers, infrastructure needs, ethical/regulatory guidelines, hydroxyurea as bridge therapy, international collaboration.
papers.summary_ja: アフリカにおける鎌状赤血球症の遺伝子治療・HSCT実用化の課題（費用・インフラ・倫理）をレビュー。ヒドロキシウレアを現実的な橋渡し療法として位置づけつつ、段階的な根治療法普及戦略を論じた。
papers.search_query: gene therapy primary immunodeficiency sickle cell children

papers.title: Retrospective study: clinical analysis of Kawasaki disease complicated with macrophage activation syndrome.
papers.abstract: Retrospective clinical analysis of Kawasaki disease complicated with macrophage activation syndrome (KD-MAS). Clinical features, treatment, and outcomes analyzed.
papers.summary_ja: 川崎病に合併するマクロファージ活性化症候群（KD-MAS）の臨床特徴・治療・転帰を後ろ向きに解析。早期診断と積極的免疫抑制療法（シクロスポリン等）の重要性を報告した。
papers.search_query: Kawasaki disease IVIG-resistant infliximab corticosteroid coronary aneurysm

papers.title: Pilot Randomised Controlled Trial of the Feasibility and Acceptability of Family-Based Time Limited Eating to Treat Obesity.
papers.abstract: 12-week pilot RCT. 18 families (10 TLE, 8 SOC). TLE feasible (100% retention), less treatment time. SOC reduced BMI percentile more. Fully powered trial needed for efficacy. NCT05107726.
papers.summary_ja: 3〜9歳肥満児18組の12週間パイロットRCTで、家族ベース時間制限食（TLE）は実施可能・継続率高いが、BMI改善は食事指導（SOC）が上回り、効果確認には大規模試験が必要。
papers.domain_name: 肥満・メタボリック症候群
